title: Bitaxe Supra
content: Bitaxe Supra is a fully open-source Bitcoin ASIC miner equipped with the BM1368 ASIC chip from Antminer's S21. This design ensures efficient and powerful mining capabilities, achieving ~700 GH/s at an energy efficiency of 17.5J/TH. It operates using a 5V DC 4A power supply connected via a 2.1/5.5mm barrel jack connector.
